tool_prompt.description:
Edit a file using hash-validated line references from read_file output. Each line from read_file is tagged as "line_number:hash|content". Use the "line_number:hash" part as a reference to target edits.
Operations: - replace: Replace a single line. Params: line="2:f1", new="replacement text" - replace_range: Replace a range. Params: start="1:a3", end="3:0e", new="new content" - insert_after: Insert after a line. Params: after="3:0e", new="new line(s)"
The hash is validated against cached file state. If the file changed since last read, the edit is rejected — re-read the file first.
